articles.title: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
articles.summary: The Russian president's refusal comes after his Ukrainian counterpart wrote an open letter calling for face-to-face talks.

articles.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
articles.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

articles.title: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
articles.summary: Russian attempt to repair tunnel area sparks safe-haven procedure for five other astronauts onboard.

articles.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
articles.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

articles.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
articles.summary: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

articles.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
articles.summary: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

articles.title: Norway's crown princess on lung transplant waiting list, palace says
articles.summary: Mette-Marit's condition, which stiffens the lungs, making it hard to breathe, has deteriorated, the royal household says.

articles.title: Everest guide survived six-day ordeal by eating chocolate and 'chewing ice'
articles.summary: Dawa Sherpa was spotted alive by a cleaning crew as he slid slowly down the world's tallest mountain and spoke to the BBC from hospital.
